title: Don't Let Me Down
why_this_song: Don't Let Me Down by The Chainsmokers (2016) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Don't let me down, down, down
Don't let me down, don't let me down, down, down
It's in my head, darling I hope
That you'll be here, when I need you the most
So don't let me, don't let me, don't let me down

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "need" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "need" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Don't Let Me Down" was released in 2016. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Don't Let Me Down" foi lançada em 2016. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Don't Let Me Down" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Don't Let Me Down" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Don't Let Me Down" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Don't Let Me Down"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Don't Let Me Down", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Don't Let Me Down", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Chainsmokers one question about "Don't Let Me Down", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Chainsmokers sobre "Don't Let Me Down", o que seria e por quê?
